functions.name: run_req_transformer
parameters:
handler: impl Fn(
            crate::types::FfiRequestData<Req>,
            Option<Environment>,
        ) -> Result<Option<Request>, IntegrationError>
functions.return_type:
Result<Option<Request>, IntegrationError>,
    ) -> Vec<u8>
    where
        Req: Message + Default,

functions.name: run_res_transformer
parameters:
handler: impl Fn(
            crate::types::FfiRequestData<Req>,
            Response,
            Option<Environment>,
        ) -> Result<Res, ConnectorResponseTransformationError>
functions.return_type:
Result<Res, ConnectorResponseTransformationError>,
    ) -> Vec<u8>
    where
        Req: Message + Default,
        Res: Message,
